landing.description: The Orbit Platform provides a rigorous, Hexagonal Architecture-based API for ledgers, crypto tracking, and smart financial rules.
landing.feature_rest_api_desc: Clean, well-documented RESTful endpoints for every financial operation.
landing.feature_architecture_desc: Hexagonal architecture with strict boundary enforcement between layers.
landing.feature_multi_currency_desc: Native support for fiat currencies and cryptocurrency tracking.
landing.feature_security_desc: Enterprise-grade security with Clerk SSO and Spring Security.

pages.users_api_desc: User management and Clerk synchronization endpoints. These endpoints handle registering new users from Clerk webhooks and retrieving user profiles.
pages.accounts_api_desc: Ledger account management for tracking fiat and crypto assets. Create accounts of various types and retrieve them by ID or user.
pages.get_by_user: Get All Accounts for a User
pages.architecture_desc: Orbit follows a Hexagonal Architecture (Ports & Adapters) organized as "Package by Feature" to maximize cohesion and minimize coupling between modules.
pages.getting_started_desc: Get up and running with the Orbit API in under 5 minutes. All you need is Java 25 and Docker Desktop.
pages.overview_desc: Orbit is a Personal Finance Management System built for developers who want full control over their financial data through a clean, extensible API.
pages.hero_desc: A rigorous, Hexagonal Architecture-based API platform for managing ledgers, multi-currency assets, crypto tracking, and smart financial rules.
pages.features_desc: A comprehensive look at what Orbit offers for personal finance management.
pages.account_types_desc: Orbit supports five account types to cover every aspect of your financial life.
pages.multi_currency_desc: Track assets in any fiat currency or cryptocurrency. Orbit supports automatic conversion with live exchange rates.
pages.security_desc: Enterprise-grade security baked into every layer of the stack.
pages.transactions_api_desc: Record and retrieve financial transactions. Creating a transaction automatically updates the associated account's balance.
pages.categories_api_desc: Manage transaction categories for classifying income and expenses. Supports both system-wide default categories and user-created custom categories.
pages.notifications_api_desc: Real-time notification system for budget alerts, bill reminders, large transactions, and goal milestones. Supports pagination and read/unread management.
pages.budgets_api_desc: Budget management for tracking spending limits per category. Create budgets with allocated items, track spending automatically from transactions, and receive alerts when approaching limits.
pages.goals_api_desc: Savings goal tracking with automatic progress from linked accounts or manual contributions. Goals auto-transition to ACHIEVED when the target amount is reached.
